name: General issue
about: Track a feature, non-functional requirement, bug, refactor, or follow-up task
title: "[FR] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

# GitHub Issues Template

Use this template for backlog items.

Title convention:
- Bug: `[BUG] Short title`
- Standalone fix: `[FIX] Short title`
- Standalone feature: `[FEATURE] Short title`
- Single functional requirement: `[FR-016] Short title`
- Single non-functional requirement: `[NFR-003] Short title`
- Single requirement: `[FR-016] Short title`
- Multiple requirements: use one bracket with `/` separators, for example `[FR-018/FR-035/FR-050] Short title`
- Mixed scopes are allowed, for example `[BUG/NFR-007] Short title`, `[FIX/FR-033] Short title`, or `[FR-029/FR-030/FR-031] Short title`

Suggested labels:
- `bug`
- `enhancement`
- `refactor`
- `tech-debt`
- `docs`
- `front-end`
- `back-end`
- `infra`
- `security`
- `testing`

```md
## Task
<clear implementation objective>

## Why
<requirement/business reason>

## Steps
- [ ] <step 1>
- [ ] <step 2>
- [ ] <step 3>

## Done When
- [ ] <verifiable outcome 1>
- [ ] <verifiable outcome 2>
- [ ] <verifiable outcome 3>
```
